behavior_in_task_description.reason: All required paths, frontmatter fields, section headings, and the just recipe name/command are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to add/extract but doesn't provide the actual content/wording of skills.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for structural elements (frontmatter fields, section topics, recipe body keywords) rather than specific gold-text wording.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: test_justfile_recipe_runs actually executes `just new-changeset-empty` as a subprocess; other tests parse YAML and validate structure.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require new files to exist with specific frontmatter and section topics; stubs would not satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the new skills, justfile recipe, frontmatter validation, and README structure as required by instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments for pass-to-pass and fail-to-pass.

structured_data_schema.reason: YAML frontmatter schema (name, description, compatibility) is explicitly specified in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: Paths and command names are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files to modify, which is appropriate scope-setting, not localization leakage.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: justfile edit is a localized recipe addition; skill files are new additions.
